task_summaries.task_scope: Measure distributional skew and Jensen-Shannon divergence of destination port feature e33 across multiple attack instances to identify consistent skew patterns.
Assess class-conditioned dependency concentration and local label consistency around destination port feature e33 to evaluate representational stability.
Evaluate potential shortcut-like predictive power of destination port distribution differences to identify risks of shortcut exploitation.
Check for temporal or batch-specific variability in destination port distribution patterns to characterize stability over time and batches.
